description: Block direct docker mutations — use your stack manager (Komodo, Portainer, etc.)
managedPath: Use your Docker stack manager (Komodo, Portainer, etc.) for all container operations
blockMessage: 🛡️ Docker mutations blocked. Use your stack manager for container management.

description: Block git operations in workspace directory
managedPath: Clone to /tmp/ first, then copy needed files to workspace
blockMessage: 🛡️ Git operations blocked in workspace. Clone to /tmp/ first.

managedPath: Ask for explicit confirmation before destructive operations on workspace
blockMessage: 🛡️ Recursive deletion of workspace blocked. Ask for explicit confirmation.

managedPath: Stage files in user-writable paths, print the sudo command for your human to run
blockMessage: 🛡️ Sudo blocked. Stage the files and provide the command for your human to run.
